description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a slender build, standing upright on a round black base. The doll has a light purple complexion and short, spiky dark hair. It is dressed in a formal outfit consisting of a gray vest over a white long-sleeve shirt, paired with slim black pants and black shoes. The facial features are delicate, with large eyes, a small nose, and a subtle, neutral expression. One arm is bent with a hand resting on the hip, while the other arm hangs down naturally. The overall appearance is modern and slightly whimsical, suitable for display or play in an urban environment.
description: A slender, stylized humanoid doll with a light purple complexion, short dark hair, and a formal gray and white outfit, standing on a round black base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's facial features, formal vest and shirt, and one hand resting on the hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the slim profile, arm position, and the layered clothing details.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the vest, shirt, and pants, as well as the doll's hairstyle and both arms' positions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the opposite profile and the relaxed arm.
attribute_clothing_style: Formal modern attire with a gray vest over a white long-sleeve shirt, slim black pants, and black dress shoes; the look is clean and businesslike, reminiscent of contemporary office or school uniforms.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with one arm bent and hand on the hip, the other arm relaxed at the side; legs are straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed mouth, wide eyes, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a calm demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, spiky dark hair with a slightly tousled texture.
